task_completion.description: Inspect the 'world_capitals' layer to find the coordinates of the target cities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the attribute table, feature info, or map view of the 'world_capitals' layer, specifically looking at Bogota, Brasilia, and Santiago (Lima is missing from the dataset).
Screenshots showing the 'field_observations' layer selected with edit mode or digitizing mode enabled (e.g., a pencil icon toggled on or a point creation tool active).

task_completion.description: Create the southwest corner point named 'Envelope_SW'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a new point being added to the map at the southwest corner of the cities' extent, and an attribute form where 'Envelope_SW' is entered into a text field.

task_completion.description: Create the northeast corner point named 'Envelope_NE'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a new point being added to the map at the northeast corner of the cities' extent, and an attribute form where 'Envelope_NE' is entered into a text field.

task_completion.description: Save the updates to the 'field_observations' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent saving the layer edits, such as clicking a save button, toggling off edit mode and accepting changes, or a confirmation message indicating the layer was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QField/GIS application interface (map canvas, layer panels, attribute forms) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the GeoPackage directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GIS software by writing answers in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent simply typing the coordinates or SQL insert statements into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent visually or logically determined the bounding box from the available data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The points created should roughly correspond to the actual southwest and northeast extremes of the visible target cities on the map, rather than arbitrary locations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target points to create are 'Envelope_SW' and 'Envelope_NE' in the 'field_observations' layer. The dataset is located at 'Imported Datasets/world_survey.gpkg'. Note: The city of Lima is completely missing from the dataset, so the agent can only use Bogota, Brasilia, and Santiago to determine the bounds. Additionally, the 'field_observations' layer schema lacks a 'name' column, so the agent may input the names 'Envelope_SW' and 'Envelope_NE' into other available text fields (like observer_name or location) to fulfill the naming requirement.
